title: Flowers Galore!
description: Adds animal crossing like flower breeding
body:
Adds animal crossing type flower breeding.

Flowers now have a property for colour

<details>
<summary>Flower Colours</summary>
  
-  White,
-  Orange,
-  Magenta,
-  Light Blue,
-  Yellow,
-  Pink,
-  Purple,
-  Blue,
-  Red,
-  Black,
-  And the elusive Gold! which has a 1 in 100 chance of being mutated when using golden fertilizer

</details>

and for shape (something entirely new!)

<details>
<summary>Flower Shapes</summary>
  
-  Default, the vanilla shape
-  Large, a larger flower
-  Small, a smaller flower
-  Multiple, Mutiple of the flowers

</details>

You gain these varients of a flower by breeding it with fertilizer (or golden fertilizer), upon which it has a 1 in 20 chance to mutate colour, and shape.


Theres also a couple extra features, which are sunflower heads, vases and rose trimmings!
![Rose trimming in mouth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d438078665cc5e9b85f243cc6695ba2568e317fa.png)
